$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the MinDrop Android toolchain. Read by scripts/validate-android.mjs and mirrored by docs/ANDROID_TOOLCHAIN.md. When you bump anything here, update the doc in the same commit.
notes: Kotlin MUST be >= the highest kotlin_version any installed @capacitor/* plugin defaults to (checked dynamically).
All @capacitor/* packages must share the same MAJOR version (currently 8).
Gradle wrapper distributionUrl and AGP classpath are compared to the ranges above.
